blocking_findings.summary: The focused gate status was recorded as pass_after_assertion_correction, leaving unclear whether the assertion correction strengthened or weakened the test.
The parity artifact had top-level status pass while the P19 plan remained in_progress, creating an early green signal before DeepSeek delta and final gates.

passing_shard_observations: Route modules are below 500 lines and preserve explicit routeContext injection.
Context work-package failure diagnostics preserve issues, phase, fixed_development_mode_gate, work_package_execution_governance, completion_authority, and executor_provenance.
Manifest records tools/workbench-server.mjs at 408 lines and extracted modules at 287, 346, 109, and 141 lines.

repairs.change: Changed top-level status to in_progress_pending_deepseek_delta_and_final_gates and added implementation_parity_status: pass.
Changed corrected gate status to standard pass and recorded that the assertion was aligned to the preserved simulated_execution phase without removing diagnostic checks.

delta_review.summary: DeepSeek short delta confirmed both blockers were closed: focused gate statuses are plain pass, and the parity artifact top-level status remains in_progress_pending_deepseek_delta_and_final_gates until final gates complete.
